BLOODMAZE-VAMPIRE.title: Vampire
BLOODMAZE-VAMPIRE.description: Heal HP equal to the unblocked damage dealt.
BLOODMAZE-HEMORRHAGE_POWER_TIP.title: Hemorrhage
BLOODMAZE-HEMORRHAGE_POWER_TIP.descripti:
#At 20 *Hemorrhage*, become *Stunned* and lose 75 HP.
At the start of the turn, gain 1 *Hemorrhage*. At the end of the turn, lose HP.
At 20, lose all stacks.
